content.en:
"Star-winged six-armed shield, first form, defense on!"

One after another star-winged six-armed shields appeared around Ye Tian, turning into layer after layer, protecting his whole body.

Thundered!!!!!

The blows of many peak realm gods bombarded Ye Tian's Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, breaking through layer after layer of Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, but in the end, it did not break all the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield.

When the pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace saw this scene, they were all dumbfounded.

"This is the Super Secret Treasure, the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield!"

They didn't think it was strange to see that Ye Tian had a six-armed shield with star wings, but it was so strange that Ye Tian had so many six-armed shields with star wings!

"Damn, how many materials did Ye Tian obtain, and he actually refined so many super dimensional secret treasures!"

At this moment, they were all moved.

"Three Seven Zero" not to mention anything else, these super dimensional secret treasures alone are worth a lot of Galan treasure coins.

This time, they may have made a lot of money.

But the premise is that Ye Tian must be killed.

At this time, Ye Tian also made a move, he didn't want to sit still.

Wow!

Ye Tian cast a superdimensional technique—the superdimensional realm wood retreat rushed towards these peak realm gods, and also urged the superdimensional secret treasures such as the Ice Orchid Pearl, the Flawless Pupil, and the Jialan Treasure Clothes, and the superdimensional light surrounded the surroundings, dazzling incomparably.

"Extradimensional vine!"

This extra-dimensional technique burst out in an instant, and one by one the vines condensed by the power of the extra-dimensional power slaughtered these peak realm gods.

However, the strength of these peak realm gods was not weak, especially the Yonghao realm gods, their strength was too strong, and with a wave of their hand, they shattered many of Ye Tian's extradimensional vines.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of these peak realm gods, and the strength of some peak realm gods was still not strong.

Burst!

The body of a peak realm god was pierced by the extradimensional vine, and his body was directly shattered, and even the Yonghao realm god had no time to save him.

There are also several peak realm gods, who were also severely injured in an instant.

The god of the Sumeru realm was severely injured by Ye Tian, and the wounds on his body were difficult to heal, this belonged to the injury of extradimensional power, how could it be so easy to recover.

"How could the Ye Heaven Realm God be so powerful!!

The gods of the Sumeru realm were shocked.

Knowing that Ye Tian was so strong, he would never propose to attack and kill Ye Tian.

But now there is no way to end it, and you must do your best to kill Ye Tian.

However, these peak realm gods attacked Ye Tian with all their might, but Ye Tian's defense was too perverted.

Suddenly.

Yonghao Realm God thought of an idea: "Seal him!"

No matter how strong the defense is, as long as Ye Tian is sealed, Ye Tian will not be able to resist, and the defense will not be effective.

Immediately.

The gods of the Yonghao Realm urged the extra-dimensional things and mobilized the super-dimensional power to seal Ye Tian.

In an instant, dense threads of extradimensional power appeared around him, trying to seal him.

Ye Tian attacked desperately, but he could only cut off a part of the silk thread of extradimensional power, especially the power of the Yonghao Realm God was too strong, and he couldn't cut it either.

Gradually, he was surrounded by extradimensional power, and it seemed that he was a little powerless to return to the sky.

But Ye Tian didn't panic at all.

Suddenly.

He sacrificed another super dimensional secret treasure, this is a kind of super dimensional secret treasure that he has refined over the years, and it is a special super dimensional secret treasure that has broken the seal-Sky Breaking Diamond!

"Broken!"

The Skybreaker turned into a streamer, instantly breaking through the layers of seals of extradimensional power, and he rushed out with the Skybreaker.

"Another Secret Treasure!"

Yonghao Realm God was slightly shocked.

How many super secret treasures does Ye Tian have!

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian continued to fight with these pinnacle realm gods, although he had been relying on a number of star wings, six-armed shields and garment armor to protect his body without any injuries, but the consumption of extradimensional things was very serious.

Gradually, the Yonghao Realm God smiled.

"Ye Tianjie God, your super dimensional secret treasure is indeed a lot, but you maintain so many super dimensional secret treasures at the same time, the super dimensional power consumed must be very exaggerated, and now I am afraid that the super dimensional power in the super dimensional thing is about to be exhausted. Once the extradimensional power is exhausted, what are you going to do to fight us?"

Yonghao Realm God laughed wildly.

He had already expected that the victory would be his own, but when he thought that Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace had fallen three peak realm gods, he felt a heartache.

These are all peak realm gods who have fused extradimensional things, and their combat power far exceeds that of ordinary peak realm gods!

Soon, after killing for a while, the extradimensional power on Ye Tian's body was about to be exhausted.

Seeing this scene, the Yonghao Realm God burst out laughing.

Then, he held a super secret treasure and attacked Ye Tian again.

Rumble!!!!

The six-armed shield of the star wings was pierced by Ye Tian, and all of them were beaten back to their initial form.

And the attack also fell on Ye Tian's body, almost piercing the Jialanbao clothes, and its powerful impact also made Ye Tian a little uncomfortable, and his body kept flying upside down.

Seeing this scene, these peak realm gods were excited, and they knew that Ye Tian finally couldn't hold on.

But suddenly, Ye Tian smiled and said, "Have you forgotten that I have other clones!"

Yonghao Realm God sneered: "What is the point of other clones? If you don't fuse the extra-dimensional things, you can't perform the extra-dimensional technique, and you don't have any combat power." "

"Really?"

Ye Tian's replica body came, and at present, he only left two replica bodies to maintain the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, although it could not completely urge the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, but at least it could exert a certain amount of power, so that the support of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace could not come, and the message transmission was cut off, which was enough.

And.

During this period of fighting, the Terrans who had migrated and avoided were also prepared, and no matter how much they fought, the impact would not be very serious.

"What's the point of coming so many clones, killing these clones of his!"

Yonghao realm Shinto.

But immediately after, each of Ye Tian's copied bodies surged with extradimensional power, which finally made Yonghao Realm's expression change.

"Could it be that you have completely 2.1 mastered the power of the extradimensional?"

"Impossible, if you completely control the power of the extradimensional, you can easily kill us!"

Yonghao Realm God had to admit that every doppelganger of Ye Tian had fused with extra-dimensional things, but how difficult it was to fuse extra-dimensional things, how much price did every peak realm god have to pay, and how many long years did they have to consume before they could hope to fuse a super-dimensional thing!

And how long Ye Tiancai has been cultivating, how long has he only entered the Death Void, how can it be possible that every copy body can successfully fuse a superdimensional thing.

This doesn't make sense!

But the gods of the Yonghao Realm had no time to think, and Ye Tian's copied bodies had used extradimensional techniques to kill them, and the extradimensional techniques of each copied body were different.

All of a sudden, the situation was immediately reversed.
